explanations.1: This sets how strict the code quality checker will be when looking for problems.
explanations.2: This tells the tool to report warnings found in test files, not just in regular code.
explanations.3: This tells the tool to ignore warnings about missing or bad documentation.
explanations.9: This starts a list of specific rules to turn off for the pycodestyle checker; each rule below (like D100, D203) is a documentation or style rule we're choosing to ignore.
